form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished fourth of 11 starters at Compiegne on April 1 over 3400m, on slow going 8 len behind Kiwanuka Du Mathan with 68kg at $14. The start before that; held ground to the line finished second of 8 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3600m, a head behind Troubadour carrying 70kg at $6.60. Hard to fault on his best jumps form.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming pulled up at Compiegne on March 11 over 3450m. Last start finished tenth of 11 starters at Compiegne on April 1 over 3400m, slow track; 29 len behind Kiwanuka Du Mathan carrying 71kg at $10. Fitter but needs to lift.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up fell at Compiegne on March 2 over 3600m. Last start made ground from midfield; ran last at this track on March 22 over 3500m, on slow going 21 len behind Good Girl De Faust carrying 67kg at $31. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Last outing finished sixth of 9 starters at Fontainebleau on March 29 over 3600m, slow track; 19 len behind Film Director with 67kg at $18. Race before finished fourth of 8 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3600m, 3.5 len behind Troubadour with 71kg at $8.50. Won't find this easy.

form.formComment: Last outing ran on from midfield; finished seventh of 10 starters at Compiegne on March 23 over 3850m, slow track; 17 len behind Dream Weaver with 65.5kg at $13. Before that raced on speed throughout then finished third of 8 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3600m, 3 len behind Troubadour carrying 68kg at $6. Must be a chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12). Last outing ran on from midfield; finished seventh of 10 starters at Compiegne on March 23 over 3850m, slow track; 17 len behind Dream Weaver with 65.5kg at $13. Before that raced on speed throughout then finished third of 8 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3600m, 3 len behind Troubadour carrying 68kg at $6. Must be a chance.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Comes off a 31 day let-up. Last run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 10 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3600m, on slow going 9 len behind Mon Inconnue with 71kg at $4.60. Run to post a big 3.5 len win. Fontainebleau on February 21 over 3600m slow track defeating Mon Inconnue with 65kg at $6.50 in a steeplechase. Can return to winning form.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after five months came from midfield; finished seventh of 9 runners at Fontainebleau on March 29 over 3600m, slow track; 29 len behind Film Director carrying 66kg at $34. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by 2.5 len Strasbourg on September 14 over 3300m defeating Call Me Queen carrying 67kg at $14 in a hurdle. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after four months finished fifth of 10 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3600m, on slow going 23 len behind Mon Inconnue carrying 71kg at $4.70. Previously second-up ran on from midfield to post a big 4 len win. Landivisiau on September 21 over 3900m slow track defeating Come Away with 65kg in a steeplechase. Fitter and sure to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At very long odds at debut, finished tenth of 14 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3550m, slow track; 29 len behind Fiumiccino carrying 64kg at $9.80. Last start lost her rider at Fontainebleau on March 29 over 3600m. Hard to have with any confidence and unlikely to feature without further improvement.
